{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322032701C6496EFF4788A1229249"}"},"total":2176},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7275670101108998947","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这男主虽然表面跟其他霸总一样冷漠人设，但没有严重到脱离实际的情况，还是长了嘴的，女主重生后不圣母，比较爱这种女主，剧情紧凑还不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694000092,"group_id":"7260706741631847436","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzV5t22jBnW34uUv1iBcYw/WMnNDfU9KP/fT9ZUaY5k9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"1248633232841272","user_name":"爱吃香蕉芝士卷的华岩"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1248633232841272","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7260706741631847436","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+双洁+扮猪吃老虎】
　　前世，林妤笙家破人亡。
　　重生归来，她决定守护家人，成为影后，让前世的恶人得到应有的惩罚。
　　鹿城的人都说林大小姐疯了，她竟然说自己喜欢那陆家私生子。
　　众人都笑她愚蠢，只会贪恋皮囊，可林妤笙却撇撇嘴，不认同，她贪恋的明明是那泼天的富贵和滔天的权势。
　　等目的达到后，她正打算拍拍屁股走人。
　　某霸总却从身后揽住她的腰，“林大小姐，上一个利用完我就跑掉的人已经被我打断了腿丢下山崖了。”
　　林妤笙心里发凉，却娴熟的回头哄他，笑的千娇百媚，“那是他该，换做我，赖在你身边一辈子。”
　　“呵！最好是。“
　　*
　　某日林影后带儿子上了一档综艺。
　　她中途接了一个电话，电话那头咬牙切齿，“林妤笙，你今天要是敢带着我的崽跟别人炒CP，明天我就敢死在你面前。”
　　电话挂断，林妤笙勾唇一笑，然后开开心心的吩咐助理收拾东西回家。
　　“不录了？”
　　“不录了。”
　　“为什么啊？”助理十分不理解。
　　林妤笙把墨镜带上，“因为再录下去，我怕孩子他爸吃醋吃到把自己吊死在我房门口。”
　　一旁唇红齿白的宝宝打了个寒颤，“妈咪，我不要爸爸死。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c3b52818dcffbe8b5952c75e8a755221","author":"遇竹","author_id":"","book_id":"7260706741631847436","book_name":"重生后她娇声轻哄，陆总见色起意","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0b090","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":745,"name":"星光璀璨","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=745&name=星光璀璨&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":860,"name":"相互救赎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=860&name=相互救赎&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7260707106603565587","read_count":"15695","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"578980"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"282","tags":"星光璀璨,现代言情,重生,娱乐圈,反派,大小姐,双洁,相互救赎","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/42d9887e36969a83a8e983ab658a77d5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779305221&x-signature=8SbibVjJlYZClOSjJeca4cAwkNU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"756904510888078","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_ 作者大大文笔好好 感觉整个文章虐的部分很少甜占大多数  但是从男女主误会开始一直到文章结束这一段都很戳我泪点 每一个人物刻画的也很有神 陆敬前期给我感觉是有点慈爱的还以为像其他文章一样是一个坏人堆里有点良心的好老头  没想到后期的大反转 谢夫人前期纯坏但其实看完觉得也很凄惨 包括后面对她儿子留的话还是让我很感动（纯为母爱感动）还有男女主的儿子刻画的好可爱  隔着屏幕都把我可爱到了 总之剧情也一点不拖沓 而且里面好几个句子我都很喜欢还记下来啦特别是这一句“情绪和性别无关，对错也是”"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725082518,"group_id":"7260706741631847436","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6vfX7UJ2/Jx0Gqm8B7e6oAdal8onHAzhL54g6pcsdPk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/381d3e7fe9214fe7a2d55047864d3032~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703775&x-signature=meYILEbtcsAqKd7SaiUvRGTJ9GQ%3D","user_id":"3131831074437934","user_name":"Jennie-."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3131831074437934","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7260706741631847436","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+双洁+扮猪吃老虎】
